calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES' DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrers to the second amended complaint (SAC) are overruled.

The SAC adequately pleads a Consumer Legal Remedies Act claim. (Id. at 9:1-10:2.) By the CLRA's plain language - which must be "liberally construed" - education is a service and plaintiff was a consumer of said service offered by defendant. (Civ. Code 1760-61.) Defendant cites no contrary court case.

The SAC adequately pleads an Unruh Act claim on theories that defendant discriminated against him as white, male and from a conservative Christian background. (Id. at 14:6-15:8.) Christian beliefs are readily inferred from a Christian background. In any event, a demurrer must dispose of an entire cause of action. (Fremont Indemnity Co. v. Fremont General Corp. (2007) 148 Cal.App.4th 97, 119.) The particularized pleading defendant demands is required only for certain fraud claims, not an Unruh Act claim.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-10-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Evan Livingstone Esq. for plaintiff(s) Andrew Jasko;

Appearance by S. Edward Slabach Esq. for defendant(s) California Institute of Integral Studies.

The jury trial date is continued to 6-10-24 per agreement of parties and there will be no further continuances due to scheduling conflicts.

Judge Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk VWU; Not Reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
